channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pen tags on the blue double doors on the High St frontage of Penge Sainsburys., 26th April
item.description:
Pen tags on the blue double doors on the High St frontage of Penge Sainsburys.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 158 - 162, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: BT kiosk fronting 109, High St, Penge, tags and stickers. Also stickers and tags on the uplighter(s) within 6 metres., 26th April
item.description:
BT kiosk fronting 109, High St, Penge, tags and stickers. Also stickers and tags on the uplighter(s) within 6 metres. This is fronting the parade of shops between the junctions of Penge Lane and Southey St.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic signs are outdated or facing the wrong way on a lamp column in High Street Penge at the junction with Empire Square., 26th April
item.description:
Traffic signs are outdated or facing the wrong way on a lamp column in High Street Penge at the junction with Empire Square. The parking sign is out of date and should just be removed. The multistory car park above the Blenheim Shopping Centre is closed and will be delolished in redevelopment plans and not replaced. The Traffic Camera sign should face oncoming traffic - though I am unclear what it is enforcing The waiting restrictions plate, giving restrictions in two directions, should face the carriageway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large deep pothole near mini roundabout, 26th April
item.description:
Pothole 2m x 2m , 125mm deep throughout. At junction of Green Vale and Alers Road. Is the B13 bus route which causes further damage daily. This large pothole has been marked up for repair for well over a month. Please what is going on with this repair? Cars are now driving on the wrong side of the road to avoid this pothole.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Vale, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese knotweed, 26th April
item.description:
Japanese knotweed in the pavement adjacent to building site on Ivy Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivy Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost was damaged, 26th April
item.description:
A scaffolding truck reversed into the lamppost and it has damaged it. It now looks really unsafe and needs placing back into place properly.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunner Lane, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - not resolved, 26th April
item.description:
9352221 Was closed but it was not resolved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Dagmar Road, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Bin hasn’t been emptied for over a week, 26th April
item.description:
Bin is extremely overflowing, nappies are everywhere, there was bags of urine on the path which we have moved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glimpsing Green, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bed frame outside old China Hall Pub, Lower Road, 26th April
item.description:
Has been there for few days - possibly linked to the mattress nearby

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Lower Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: Flytipped mattress outside China Hall Mews, 26th April
item.description:
Mattress has been there for several days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, China Hall Mews, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: Blocked storm drain, 26th April
item.description:
This storm drain has been blocked for years. It's right by the Biggin Hill bus stop heading north. Bus wheels splash over it and put filth on pavement and pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beulah Hill, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fox brought a dead cat to the drive, 26th April
item.description:
A fox brought a dead cat to our drive way. We need it removal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Halfway Street, Sidcup
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Rubbish left
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, The Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping here all the time, 26th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on stairwells wall Breton House, 26th April
item.description:
We found a graffiti on 5th floor stairwells wall please paint it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop completely broken, 26th April
item.description:
This bus stop has been struck by a vehicle and is falling over. It needs to be fixed. It’s not safe. It makes it hard for the bus driver to see that there’s a stop here. The last time the. Us drove by me here. It’s been like this for many weeks. As a girl leaving the gym late, I need to know the bus won’t drive by me again as it’s not safe to have to walk home alone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe transverse road cracking causing impact and vibration outside 12 Mickleham Road, 26th April
item.description:
There are two transverse cracks running across the full width of the road outside 12 Mickleham Road, BR5 2RL, aligned with utility covers on both sides of the pavement. The condition has progressively worsened over approximately the past 16 months, and the surface is now uneven. When heavy vehicles, particularly buses, pass over these defects, a significant impact occurs. This generates noticeable vibration within the property, now clearly felt on the second floor. The severity of the impact has increased over time, suggesting possible subsidence or failure of a reinstated trench beneath the carriageway. This requires inspection and repair as a matter of urgency.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Merry Christmas, 26th April
item.description:
This Christmas tree has been there for a week or so. Alleyway needs CCTV, fines and signs letting residents know that fines will be issued if they don’t dispose of rubbish properly. Also council needs to provide for a better way to dispose of household waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whittington Road, Wood Green, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping in alleyway, 26th April
item.description:
Alleyway needs CCTV. This has been there whole afternoon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ireland Place, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti alley, 26th April
item.description:
Multiple tags.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
